notes: Excellent work. Email accurately captures all five decisions (event assignments, announcement bundling approach, excitement ranking constraint, competitive sheet scope/style, messaging pillars), all action items with specific owners and deadlines, and all open items. Format is professional with proper subject line, greeting, structured sections, and closing. Table-based action items are exceptionally scannable. Tone matches team's collaborative-but-direct style. Content is highly actionable—team members know exactly what to do and when. Minor deduction: email length slightly exceeds ideal "under a minute" scan time for very busy readers, though formatting mitigates this. Agent created duplicate file (`follow_up_email_1.md`), showing minor inefficiency, but this does not affect email quality itself.
